reasoning: The resolution criteria require 500,000 or more Palestinians to have left Gaza before December 31st, 2025. According to authoritative sources such as the Palestinian Central Bureau of Statistics (end of 2024), Al Jazeera (early 2025), and a Costs of War report (October 2025), roughly 100,000 to 110,000 Palestinians have managed to leave Gaza since the beginning of the war. There is no indication of borders opening up to allow an additional ~400,000 people to leave in the next 3 weeks before the end of the year. The community prediction on Metaculus was 0.01 just over a week ago. Therefore, the probability of this occurring is virtually nil, bounded only by extreme, unforeseen developments or previously uncounted historical exits, making 0.02 an appropriate and highly confident estimate.
